content.content:
\paragraph{1996 B--2 \textnormal{[\texttt{asymptotic, integral-inequality}]}}
Show that for every positive integer $n$,
\[
\left( \frac{2n-1}{e} \right)^{\frac{2n-1}{2}} < 1 \cdot 3 \cdot 5
\cdots (2n-1) < \left( \frac{2n+1}{e} \right)^{\frac{2n+1}{2}}.
\]

content.text:
Looking at this problem: prove that for every positive integer $n$,
$$\left(\frac{2n-1}{e}\right)^{(2n-1)/2} < 1 \cdot 3 \cdots (2n-1) < \left(\frac{2n+1}{e}\right)^{(2n+1)/2}$$

This is a "show that" problem (no answer needed). I'll prove it by induction on $n$.

input.content:
import Mathlib

open Real Finset

theorem putnam_1996_b2 (n : ℕ) (hn : 0 < n) :
    ((2 * (n : ℝ) - 1) / Real.exp 1) ^ ((2 * (n : ℝ) - 1) / 2) <
      ∏ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * ((k : ℝ) + 1) - 1) ∧
    ∏ k ∈ Finset.range n, (2 * ((k : ℝ) + 1) - 1) <
      ((2 * (n : ℝ) + 1) / Real.exp 1) ^ ((2 * (n : ℝ) + 1) / 2) := by
  sorry
